articles.title: Show HN: WhatCable, a tiny menu bar app for inspecting USB-C cables
articles.description: USB-C cables can be a mess. One cable charges at 5W, another does 100W and Thunderbolt 4, and they look identical in the drawer. WhatCable sits in your menu bar and reads the cable data your Mac already has access to. Plug in a cable and it tells you in plain English what it can actually do: charging wattage, data speed, display support, Thunderbolt, etc. Built in Swift/SwiftUI. Open source, free, no tracking. tech.summary:
🔬 今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI与法律博弈持续升温**：马斯克与奥特曼的法律纠纷在陪审团离席期间出现戏剧性转折，同时马斯克在OpenAI庭审中遭遇多次证词失误，凸显科技巨头间竞争与监管的复杂性。

2. **消费科技市场分化加剧**：Roblox因年龄验证措施导致日活跃用户持续下滑，而苹果iPhone营收逆势增长至570亿美元，显示不同企业应对市场挑战的策略差异。

3. **电动汽车产业面临政策与产能双重变数**：Rivian营收因R2车型投产而上升，但特朗普政府削减贷款协议迫使公司缩减新工厂规模，反映美国新能源车产业受政治环境波动影响。

4. **平台监管与内容安全冲突升级**：Meta威胁若新墨西哥州强制要求“技术上不可行”的修改将撤出该州，同时美国国会再次推迟监控改革，科技公司的合规边界争议持续。

5. **网络安全与地缘政治风险凸显**：Linux系统遭遇近年来最严重安全威胁，俄罗斯因太空港暴露于乌克兰打击范围而加密发射计划，全球科技安全环境面临新挑战。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：科技产业在AI法律纠纷、消费市场分化、政策波动与安全威胁等多重压力下，正进入一个高度不确定的调整期，企业战略与政府监管的博弈将深刻影响未来格局。

ai.summary:
🔬 今日AI动态摘要

1. **AI评估成为新算力瓶颈**：Hugging Face指出，随着模型规模扩大，AI评估（evals）的算力需求正超过训练本身，成为新的性能瓶颈，凸显标准化评测基础设施的重要性。

2. **具身智能仿真框架开源突破**：国内团队开源新一代具身智能仿真框架，实现高吞吐、并行高保真渲染，旨在解决视觉仿真算力瓶颈，为规模化训练提供支持。

3. **AI经济基础设施加速构建**：Stripe发布288项新功能，聚焦AI时代的经济基础设施；同时阿里推出数字员工产品QoderWake，可承担多种岗位角色，标志AI正从工具向“数字劳动力”演进。

4. **人机协作与生产关系重构**：商汤杨帆提出AI拐点已至，核心是从“人用AI”转向“人机协作”，本质是生产关系的重构，预示组织与工作模式将迎来深层变革。

5. **AI与法律、商业伦理交织**：马斯克与OpenAI开庭互揭底细，反映AI领域巨头间的法律与商业摩擦加剧，行业治理与透明度问题日益突出。

📌 今日最值得关注的发展是：AI评估的算力瓶颈被正式提出，同时具身智能仿真框架与数字员工产品密集落地，表明AI正从“模型竞赛”转向“基础设施与协作生态”的全面布局。

articles.description: The Jack Ma Foundation has pledged to spend at least 300 million yuan ($45 million) in the next decade to staff rural schools with qualified teachers.

articles.title: New Party delegation from Taiwan visits mainland
articles.description: The director of the State Council's Taiwan Affairs Office met with a delegation from Taiwan's New Party on Monday to promote peaceful development of cross-Straits relations.

articles.title: NGO helps epileptic boy realize racing dream in Zhejiang
articles.description: An NGO helped an epileptic boy from eastern China realize his dream to ride a race car on an international circuit on Monday.

articles.title: Six killed in Hebei bath house fire
articles.description: Six people were killed on Sunday afternoon in a fire at a bath house in Yongnian district of Handan, Hebei province, authorities said on Monday.

articles.title: Residents mobilized to protect environment in Tibet
articles.description: Residents of southwest China's Tibet autonomous region have been mobilized for government-paid patrolling jobs to protect the ecosystem on the "roof of the world."

articles.title: Israeli feels special connection to Harbin
articles.description: A young foreign man walks around the city, giving big hugs to the strangers he meets on the streets in Harbin, capital of Northeast China’s Heilongjiang province.

articles.title: Honor mobile phone leading in AI speed
articles.description: Many commentators have deemed 2017 to be year one for the artificial intelligence smartphone as iPhone X and Honor V10 launched into the highly competitive but uniform cellphone market. So will an intelligent phone be the next great breakthrough?

articles.title: Xi’an security guard dies trying to save suicidal woman
articles.description: Police in Xi’an, Shaanxi province, are investigating the death of a security guard who tried to catch a woman who jumped from the 11th floor of a building, Huashang Daily reported on Monday.

articles.title: 'Naughty' elephant damages two vehicles in SW China
articles.description: A wild Asian elephant turned a highway in southwest China's Yunnan province into its playground, damaging a minibus and a sedan Saturday afternoon.

articles.title: Algerian boy, 12, wins Shenzhen talent contest
articles.description: A 12-year-old Algerian boy was crowned winner of the eighth Shenzhen Expats Chinese Talent Competition on Sunday.

articles.title: Duke Kunshan starts search for bachelor’s degree students
articles.description: Duke Kunshan University, a joint venture between Duke University in the US and China’s Wuhan University, has started to enroll its first class of undergraduate students.

articles.title: Former Chongqing Party chief under investigation
articles.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former Party chief of Chongqing, is being investigated on allegations of bribery, State prosecutors said on Monday.

articles.title: Top procuratorate investigates Sun Zhengcai
articles.description: The Supreme People's Procuratorate (SPP) of China announced on Monday that it has started investigation into Sun Zhengcai, former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

articles.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
articles.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

articles.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
articles.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

articles.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
articles.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
articles.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
articles.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

articles.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
articles.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

articles.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
articles.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.

cctv.summary:
📺 今日要闻要点

1. 美国华盛顿特区枪击案嫌疑人致信家人表达对政府不满，引发关注。  
2. 中国民众关注教育与医疗费用问题，成为两会热点。  
3. 中俄举行联合导弹防御演习，强化战略协作。  
4. 中国加速推动军事技术向民用领域转化，助力经济发展。  
5. 南京大屠杀幸存者最年长者去世，享年100岁。  

今日重点涵盖国际安全、民生关切、中俄合作、军民融合及历史纪念。
